details: "Mukhyamantri Balika Protsahan Yojana", launched by the Education Department, Bihar, aims to promote education among girls and encourage academic excellence. The scheme rewards girls who secure a first division in their matriculation examination with a one-time financial incentive of ₹10,000/-.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of the respective state.
The applicant must be a girl student.
She must have secured a first division in her matriculation examination.

offline: Scroll down below and click on "Apply For Matric 2022 Scholarship Only".
Read the instructions and click on the check-boxes. Click on "Continue".
Enter all the mandatory details and create a new password. Validate the Captcha code.
Click on “Submit” to generate the login ID and Password.
Enter all the mandatory details and upload all the required documents.
Recheck all entries before final submission, no modifications can be made in the application after final submission.
Click on “Submit” and take a printout of a copy of the submitted application.

documents_required: Birth Certificate or School Transfer Certificate (for age proof).
Bank Account Details (Account Number, IFSC Code, Bank Name, and Branch).

faqs.question: What is "Mukhyamantri Balika Protsahan Yojana"?
faqs.answer: "Mukhyamantri Balika Protsahan Yojana" is a government scheme that provides a financial incentive of ₹10,000 to girl students who secure a first division in their matriculation examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Only girl students who have secured a first division in their matriculation examination and are residents of the respective state are eligible for this scheme.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit to avail of this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, there is no income limit for eligibility under this scheme.

faqs.question: How is the incentive amount disbursed?
faqs.answer: The incentive amount is transferred directly to the applicant's registered bank account.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable to boys?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is exclusively for girl students.

faqs.question: Can students who scored a second division apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only students who have secured a first division in their matriculation examination are eligible.

faqs.question: Can a student from another state apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is only available to students who are residents of the state where it is implemented.

faqs.question: Where can applicants find more information about the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants can find more information by visiting the official website of the education department.
